original_statement: what is the total number of websites listed?
mutated_statement: what is the total number of something mentioned?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 关系动词替换: "websites" 被泛化为模糊指代 "something" | 关系词 "listed" → "mentioned" (websites → something | listed → mentioned)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可见关键证据：Agent 明确写道“most plausibly refers to the count of subjects listed under ‘bitesize by the bbc’... Counting the comma-separated subjects yields 19”，并列出具体科目清单。Agent 在执行日志中直接用 simple_query 得出具体数值 19 并给出解释，整个过程没有出现任何模糊性提示、澄清请求或不确定性用词。基于此，Agent 的行为特征是将模糊问题视为明确问题并直接按自己的假设计算答案，未表现出对原始问题“something/mentioned”泛化导致的不确定性的认知或询问，因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
